pageContext.name: Joey Tribbiani 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The FRIENDS™ Chibi® coin series continues with the much-loved character, Joey Tribbiani™! More than just an actor and food lover, Joey is a sweet and caring guy who loves his friends.  Made from 1oz pure silver, this charming piece showcases Joey holding his pet duck, Duck Sr, and is shaped and colored to resemble him as Chibi art. The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, confirming it is legal tender.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin arrives in a FRIENDS-themed case and includes a large window, perfect for display. The Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back which further confirms the coin's legal tender status, along with the coin's unique serial number in the limited mintage of 2,000.   Order yours today and celebrate this amazing friend!
